items.title: Evacuations planned as suspected hantavirus outbreak traps 150 on cruise ship
items.summary: Medics were working on Monday to evacuate two people with symptoms of the deadly hantavirus after a suspected outbreak on a luxury cruise ship held off Cape Verde, which has left around 150 stuck on board the vessel with the ship refused permission to dock.

items.title: Armenia hosts historic EU summit as it charts path away from Russia
items.summary: Armenia hosts its first bilateral summit with the European Union on Tuesday, a landmark diplomatic moment for the Caucasus Mountains nation that has formally declared its ambition to join the bloc and is cautiously loosening its ties with longtime ally Russia. France 24's correspondent in Yerevan Taline Oundjian has the latest.

items.title: War with Iran threatens to reignite as Trump launches 'Project Freedom'
items.summary: A ceasefire between Iran and the United States was teetering Monday as the two countries traded fire over the strategic Strait of Hormuz, a day after President Donald Trump announced an operation to escort trapped vessels through the strait dubbed “Project Freedom”. France 24’s Philip Turle takes a look at the latest developments.

items.title: Truce under threat as Iran, US trade fire in Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: The fragile truce in the Middle East was in jeopardy on Tuesday after the ​U.S. and Iran launched new attacks as they wrestled for control of the Strait of Hormuz. The U.S. military said on Monday it destroyed six Iranian small boats, as well as cruise missiles and drones, after President Donald Trump sent the navy to escort stranded tankers through the strait in a campaign he called "Project Freedom".

items.title: Dozens killed, scores injured in explosion at Chinese fireworks factory
items.summary: A giant explosion at a fireworks factory in Liuyang, Hunan province in Central China has killed 26 people and injured 61 others, officials said Tuesday. Liuyang is a major fireworks hub, producing around 60 percent of the fireworks sold in China and 70 percent of those exported.

items.title: French prodigy Paul Seixas to compete in Tour de France for first time
items.summary: Paul Seixas has announced that he will be competing in the 2026 Tour de France. At 19, he will be the youngest rider to start the Tour since 1937.

items.title: Former model accuses French scout of grooming her for Epstein
items.summary: Former French model Juliette G said Daniel Siad, a French modelling scout with close ties to late sex offender Jeffrey Epstein, had groomer her with the aim of introducing her to potential abusers. Juliette, who has asked to withhold her surname to protect her privacy, is one of two ex-models to have accused Siad of grooming.

items.title: Middle East live: Iran 'not even started' with Hormuz standoff as US tries to force open the strait
items.summary: Iran's chief negotiator in talks with the United States, Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf, warned on Tuesday that his country has "not even started" in its standoff over the Strait of Hormuz. Ghalibaf, who is also the speaker in Iran's parliament, said the actions of the US and its allies had put shipping security at risk, but said their "presence will diminish". Follow our liveblog for the latest developments.

items.title: US and UAE report Iran attacks as military pushes to reopen Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: US forces opened a passage through the Strait of Hormuz on Monday after sinking Iranian boats and escorting merchant ships, as fresh attacks struck vessels and facilities in the United Arab Emirates. The escalation has raised fears over global energy supplies and risks derailing a fragile regional ceasefire.

items.title: Armenia turns 'towards Europe' as Macron highlights shift from Russia
items.summary: French President Emmanuel Macron said Armenia has chosen a path “towards Europe” during a visit to Yerevan on Monday, highlighting the country’s gradual shift away from Russia’s influence. The remarks came as European leaders gathered in Armenia for regional summits focused on security and cooperation with the EU.

items.title: GameStop veut racheter eBay : le pari fou qui divise Wall Street
items.summary: L’enseigne de jeux vidéo GameStop a lancé une offre à 56 milliards de dollars pour racheter eBay. Une opération spectaculaire, qui ravive deux icônes du web… mais qui laisse les marchés sceptiques.

translation.title: GameStop wants to buy eBay: the crazy bet that divides Wall Street
translation.summary: The GameStop video game brand has launched a $56 billion offer to buy eBay. A spectacular operation that revives two web icons... but leaves markets sceptical.

items.title: Tiraillée entre l'UE et le Royaume-Uni, l'Écosse rêve-t-elle toujours d'indépendance ?
items.summary: Dix ans après le Brexit, la question de l’indépendance divise l’Écosse plus que jamais. À l’approche des élections parlementaires du 7 mai, ENTR est parti à la rencontre de deux jeunes aux points de vue diamétralement opposés sur le sujet.

translation.title: Does Scotland still dream of independence, drawn between the EU and the United Kingdom?
translation.summary: Ten years after Brexit, the question of independence divides Scotland more than ever. In the run-up to the 7 May parliamentary elections, ENTR went to meet two young people with diametrically opposed views on the subject.

items.title: En Arménie, Emmanuel Macron prône la "relation singulière" avec la France
items.summary: Le président français s'est rendu mardi sur le mémorial des victimes du génocide arménien. Emmanuel Macron a rappelé la "relation singulière" qui lie l'Arménie et la France. Il a aussi conclut un partenariat stratégique avec cette ex-république soviétique partagée entre aspirations européennes et liens historiques avec la Russie.

translation.title: In Armenia, Emmanuel Macron advocates "a singular relationship" with France
translation.summary: The French President visited the memorial of the victims of the Armenian genocide on Tuesday. Emmanuel Macron recalled the "single relationship" between Armenia and France. He also entered into a strategic partnership with this former Soviet republic, shared between European aspirations and historical ties with Russia.

items.title: Mali : "Le Jnim est conscient qu’il a besoin d’une alliance plus large pour faire chuter la junte"
items.summary: Un climat de fébrilité règne à Bamako, où les forces de la junte ont procédé à plusieurs arrestations après les attaques du 25 avril menées par les combattants du Jnim et ses alliés indépendantistes touaregs. Une répression qui pourrait pousser les oppositions maliennes à se rapprocher du groupe jihadiste, selon Wassim Nasr, spécialiste des mouvements jihadistes en Afrique et au Moyen-Orient.

translation.title: Mali: "Jnim is aware that he needs a wider alliance to bring down the junta"
translation.summary: A climate of febrileness prevails in Bamako, where the junta forces made several arrests after the 25 April attacks by the Jnim fighters and its Tuareg independence allies. A crackdown that could push Malian opposition to move closer to the jihadist group, according to Wassim Nasr, a specialist in jihadist movements in Africa and the Middle East.

items.title: Audiovisuel public : la présidente de France Télévisions dénonce un rapport Alloncle "à charge"
items.summary: Dans son rapport issu des travaux de la commission d'enquête sur l'audiovisuel public, publié mardi, le député Charles Alloncle estime que l'audiovisuel public est en "crise" financière et administrative, et aurait "(perdu) le contact avec les attentes des Français". La présidente de France Télévisions, Delphine Ernotte Cunci, dénonce un rapport "à charge" tandis que le Premier ministre Sébastien Lecornu regrette une "occasion manquée".

translation.title: Public Audiovisual: President of France Télévisions denounces Alloncle report "at charge"
translation.summary: In his report on the work of the committee of inquiry on public audiovisual, published on Tuesday, MP Charles Alloncle believes that public audiovisual is in financial and administrative crisis, and would have "losed contact with the expectations of the French". The president of France Télévisions, Delphine Ernotte Cunci, denounces a report "on charge" while Prime Minister Sébastien Lecornu regrets a "missed opportunity".

items.title: Algérie : Christophe Gleizes renonce à son pourvoi en cassation dans l'espoir d'une grâce
items.summary: La famille de Christophe Gleizes, condamné à sept ans de prison et détenu en Algérie, a indiqué mardi que le journaliste français avait renoncé à son pourvoi en cassation. "Il s'en remet totalement à la clémence du président Tebboune", a expliqué sa mère.

translation.title: Algeria: Christophe Gleizes renounces his appeal in cassation in the hope of a pardon
translation.summary: Christophe Gleizes' family, sentenced to seven years in prison and detained in Algeria, said on Tuesday that the French journalist had waived his appeal in cassation. "He totally relies on President Tebboune's mercy," his mother explained.

items.title: Au Kremlin, Vladimir Poutine de plus en plus isolé ?
items.summary: A la Une de la presse, ce mardi 5 mai, le regain de tensions dans le détroit d’Ormuz, alors que les négociations entre les Etats-Unis et l’Iran semblent piétiner. La Russie en difficulté en Ukraine, et le président Poutine de plus en plus isolé. Les 50 ans du quotidien espagnol El Pais. La remise du prix Pulitzer aux Etats-Unis. Et les plus belles (et plus laides ?) tenues du Met Gala.

translation.title: In the Kremlin, Vladimir Putin is increasingly isolated?
translation.summary: On the front page of the press, this Tuesday, May 5, the renewed tension in the Strait of Ormuz, while the negotiations between the United States and Iran seem to be stalling. Russia in difficulty in Ukraine, and President Putin increasingly isolated. The 50th anniversary of the Spanish daily El Pais. The Pulitzer Award in the United States. And the most beautiful (and more ugly?) outfits of the Met Gala.

items.title: Ligue des champions : et si le dernier match de Griezmann avec l'Atlético était une finale ?

Si l'Atlético Madrid parvient à vaincre les Gunners chez eux, les coéquipiers du champion du monde pourraient filer en finale et espérer lui offrir le dernier titre collectif qui manque à son palmarès : une C1.

translation.title: Champions League: What if Griezmann's last game with Atlético was a final?

If Atlético Madrid succeeds in defeating the Gunners at home, the team-mates of the world champion could run into the final and hope to give him the last collective title missing in his list: a C1.

items.summary: 6月5日是世界环境日，也是我国环境保护法确立的环境日。 22年前的这一天，在时任浙江省委书记习近平部署推动下，以农村人居环境整治为重点的“千万工程”启动。 当时，习近平同志担任浙江省委书记刚半年多，工作千头万绪。他何以将农村人居环境整治作为重点工作？ 在基层调研时，习近平同志发现，在浙江经济快速发展的同时，广大农村却面临“成长的烦恼”，村庄面貌不如人意。 全省3.4万个村庄中，人居环境较好的仅4000个。有人形容：“走过一村又一村，村村都是垃圾村。”还有农民这样描述：“起早贪黑赚钞票，垃圾堆里数钞票，躺在医院花钞票。”可以说，人居环境整治是当时浙江农村群众的一个迫切期盼。 “千万工程”聚焦乡亲们走什么村道、怎么处理畜禽粪便等小问题，却直接关系农民获得感、幸福感，是实打实的民生大事。 老百姓的生活环境如何，习近平同志念兹在兹： 上世纪70年代，在陕北冯家坪公社赵家河大队驻点时，他撸起袖管，一石一瓦盖起村里第一个男女分开的厕所； 到正定工作，不仅大力推进“人拉猪吃”的“连茅圈”改造工作，还拿着大扫帚走上街头搞卫生，推动成立全县第一支专职卫生清洁队； 任福州市委书记，亲自为建造垃圾处理场选址

translation.title: Learn the handbooks.
translation.summary: 5 June is World Environment Day and the environmental day established by our environmental protection laws. Twenty-two years ago, with the deployment of Xi Jinping, then Secretary-General of Zhejiang Province, the “millions of projects” focusing on the environmental rehabilitation of rural settlements were launched. At that time, Comrade Xi had been the secretary of the Zhejiang province for more than six months and had been working for a long time. Why does he focus on the rehabilitation of the rural habitat environment? At the grass-roots level, Comrade Xi found that while the Zhejiang economy was growing rapidly, the rural areas were faced with “growth problems” and the villages were less than satisfactory. Out of 34,000 villages in the province, only 4,000 have a better habitat. It was described as “a village after a village, which is full of garbage”. And the farmers described it as: “Getting up early and making money, counting it in the trash, spending it in the hospital.” It can be said that the remediation of the habitat environment was an urgent aspiration of the rural population of Zhejiang at the time. The fact that millions of projects focus on small problems such as what villages to follow and how to deal with animal and animal dung is a matter of life for the farmers. items.title: 刘国中在安徽调研时强调 全力以赴夺取夏粮丰收 全面打牢秋粮生产基础
items.summary: 新华社合肥6月5日电 中共中央政治局委员、国务院副总理刘国中3日至5日到安徽调研“三夏”农业生产工作。他强调，要深入学习贯彻习近平总书记关于国家粮食安全的重要论述，按照党中央、国务院部署，扛稳政治责任，毫不放松抓好夏收夏种夏管，全力以赴夺取夏粮丰收，全面打牢秋粮生产基础，确保完成全年粮食生产目标任务。 刘国中先后来到宿州市、淮南市、六安市，深入小麦机收和夏播现场、农机跨区作业服务点、农事服务中心、粮食仓储中心、地方农科院等，实地察看夏收夏种、农机作业服务保障、粮食烘干收储等工作，详细了解农作物新品种选育、大面积单产提升、农资保供稳价、高标准农田建设等情况。 刘国中强调，“三夏”工作抓得好不好，事关全年粮食生产目标任务能否顺利实现。当前正值“三夏”农业生产关键时期，要抓住有利天气抢晴收获，组织好农机跨区作业，强化服务保障和安全管理，确保夏收高效进行。要抓实抓牢机收减损、烘干晾晒等各项措施，最大程度减少粮食损失。要精心做好夏粮收购工作，引导各类企业积极入市，保障粮食市场平稳运行。要压茬推进夏播，加强农资供应和农事服务，强化技术集成及推广应用，落实落细合理密植、精量播种等大面积单产提升措施，

translation.title: Liu Guo-jung, during Anhui's research, stressed that he was doing his best to seize the harvest of summer grains, and to secure the production base of autumn grains.
translation.summary: On June 5th, a member of the Central Political Bureau of the Communist Party and Deputy Prime Minister of the State Council, Liu Guo Guo, visited Anhui to study the “Summer” agricultural work. He stressed the need to follow up on the important statement of the Secretary-General of Xi on national food security and to ensure that the goal of food production for the whole year was fulfilled, in line with the deployment of the central party and the State Council, taking firm political responsibilities, holding up the summer harvest, and making every effort to seize the harvest of summer food. Liu went to Cebu City, Huainan City, San City, and went to the wheat machine harvest and summer station, the farm machine cross-district operation service, the agricultural service centre, the food storage centre, the local farm school, etc., to see on-site the work of the summer harvest, the guarantee of agricultural machine service, the dry storage of food, etc., and to learn more about the selection of new crop varieties, the improvement of large areas of single production, the maintenance of agricultural resources at stable prices, and the construction of high standard agricultural land. Liu stressed that the success of the “Tsummer” exercise was a matter of success in achieving the annual food production target. At this critical time of “three summers” of agricultural production, it is necessary to seize the favourable weather and harvest, organize cross-regional operations on agricultural machines, enhance service security and safety management, and ensure that summer harvests are conducted efficiently. Food losses should be minimized by the adoption of measures such as obscuring the machine for erosion and drying. It is important to ensure the smooth functioning of the food market by carefully preparing for the acquisition of food for the summer, and by directing the various enterprises to the market. items.title: 韩正会见中美高级别二轨对话美方代表团
items.summary: 新华社北京6月5日电 6月5日，国家副主席韩正在北京会见中美高级别二轨对话美方代表团。 韩正表示，中美关系是当今世界最重要的双边关系之一。当前，中美关系处于关键历史节点。中美相互尊重、和平共处、合作共赢，不仅有利于两国，也有利于世界和平与发展。希望中美高级别二轨对话能不断汇聚两国有识之士的真知灼见，增进美国各界对中国的了解和理解，共同推动中美关系稳定、健康、可持续发展。 美方表示，美中高级别二轨对话有助于双方更好理解对方，为两国关系发展提供更多有益思路。中国经济发展令人钦佩，双方应加强贸易、投资等领域对话合作。

translation.title: Han is meeting with the United States delegation to the High-level Second Track Dialogue between China and the United States
translation.summary: On 5 June, the Vice-President of Xinhua, Han, met in Beijing with the United States delegation to the High-level Second Track Dialogue between China and the United States. Han is saying that Chinese-American relations are one of the most important bilateral relations in the world today. Currently, US-China relations are at a critical historical node. Mutual respect, peaceful coexistence and co-operation between China and the United States are beneficial not only to both countries but also to world peace and development. It is to be hoped that the high-level second-track dialogue between China and the United States will continue to bring together the insights of knowledgeable people from the two countries, enhance understanding and understanding of China among the United States, and work together to promote stable, healthy and sustainable relations between China and the United States. The United States side stated that the two sides would benefit from a better understanding of each other and from more useful ideas for the development of their relations. China ' s economic development was admirable, and the two sides should strengthen dialogue and cooperation in the areas of trade and investment.

items.title: 国务院印发《关于开展第四次全国农业普查的通知》
items.summary: 新华社北京6月5日电　国务院日前印发《关于开展第四次全国农业普查的通知》（以下简称《通知》）。根据《中华人民共和国统计法》和《全国农业普查条例》规定，国务院决定于2026年开展第四次全国农业普查。 　　《通知》强调，第四次全国农业普查是在以中国式现代化全面推进中华民族伟大复兴的新征程上开展的一项重大国情国力调查，要以习近平新时代中国特色社会主义思想为指导，深入贯彻党的二十大和二十届二中、三中全会精神，认真落实党中央、国务院决策部署，坚持依法普查、科学普查、为民普查，坚持实事求是、守正创新，全面摸清新时代我国“三农”家底，客观反映农业发展新情况、乡村建设新面貌、农民生活新变化、农村改革新成效。 　　《通知》指出，第四次全国农业普查的对象是在中华人民共和国境内的农村住户，包括农村农业生产经营户和其他住户；城镇农业生产经营户；农业生产经营单位；村民委员会；乡镇人民政府。普查的主要内容包括农业生产条件、粮食和大食物生产情况、农业新质生产力情况、乡村发展基本情况、农村居民生活情况等。普查的标准时点为2026年12月31日24时，时期资料为2026年年度资料。 　　《通知》要求，各地区、各部门要按

translation.title: Circular on the conduct of the Fourth National Agricultural Census issued by the State Council
translation.summary: Xinhua News Service, Beijing, 5 June In accordance with the Statistical Law of the People ' s Republic of China and the Regulations on the National Agricultural Census, the State Council decided to conduct the Fourth National Agricultural Census in 2026. The Circular stressed that the Fourth National Agricultural Census was a major national survey on the new quest for a comprehensive revival of the Chinese nation through China's modernization, guided by the Chinese socialist ideology of Xi Jinping's new era, and guided by the spirit of the 20th and 20th China-China Congresses, and by the serious implementation of the Party's central and State Council's decision-making process. It was determined that the census should be conducted in accordance with the law, that the scientific census should be conducted and that the census should be conducted for the people's census, that it should be carried out in accordance with the law, that it should be carried out in a realistic and innovative manner, and that the “three farmers” of the new era should be thoroughly examined in order to objectively reflect new developments in agricultural development, new aspects of rural construction, new changes in rural life and new effects of rural reform. The Circular states that the Fourth National Agricultural Survey is aimed at rural households in the People ' s Republic of China, including rural agricultural producers and other households; urban agricultural producers; agricultural production units; villagers ' committees; and town and town people ' s governments. The main elements of the census include agricultural production conditions, food and food production, new quality of agricultural productivity, basics of rural development, living conditions of rural residents, etc. The standard time of the census is 2400 hours on 31 December 2026, and the data for the period is annual 2026. items.title: 中央军委主席习近平签署命令 发布《军事设施建设条例》
items.summary: 新华社北京6月5日电 中央军委主席习近平日前签署命令，发布《军事设施建设条例》，自2025年8月1日起施行。 条例深入贯彻习近平强军思想，深入贯彻新时代军事战略方针，聚焦服务备战打仗，适应新的领导指挥体制和保障模式，科学规范军事设施建设的基本原则、管理体制、运行机制和工作制度，是军事设施建设工作的重要依据。 条例共11章63条，按照军委管总、战区主战、军种主建的总原则，围绕理顺建设链、管理链、监督链，重点从军事设施建设计划管理、项目审批、工程发包、勘察设计、施工管理、应急建设、安全保密、监督问责等方面，厘清管理权限，优化流程机制，固化实践成果，为提高军事设施建设质量效益和保障能力提供有力法治保障。

translation.title: The President of the Central Military Commission, Xi Jinping, signed an order to issue regulations on the construction of military installations
translation.summary: Xinhua News Agency, Beijing, 5 June The regulations further implement Xi Jinping ' s military doctrine, the strategic military approach of the new era, the focus on service preparation for combat, the adaptation of the new model of command and control, and the scientific regulation of the basic principles of the construction of military facilities, the regulatory framework, the operational mechanisms and the working system, are important bases for the construction of military facilities. In accordance with the general principles of the Military Commission ' s General Administration, the main war zone and military construction, the regulations provide for the clarification of management competencies, the optimization of process mechanisms, the consolidation of practical results and the provision of robust rule of law guarantees for the quality and safety of military facilities, in accordance with the general principles of the Military Commission, chapter 11, section 63, and the streamlining of the construction chain, the management chain and the chain of supervision, with emphasis on the management of the military facilities construction plan, project approval, engineering contracting, survey design, construction management, emergency response, security confidentiality and oversight accountability.

items.title: 丁薛祥在山西调研时强调 守好公平公正“生命线” 确保实现“平安高考”目标
items.summary: 新华社太原6月5日电　6月3日至4日，中共中央政治局常委、国务院副总理丁薛祥在山西调研高考组织保障和能源改革发展等工作。 　　丁薛祥首先前往山西省招生考试管理中心和太原市晋源区实验中学考点，听取高考工作情况汇报，实地察看考务组织各环节工作情况。他说，高考事关国计民生，关系千家万户切身利益。要认真学习贯彻习近平总书记重要指示精神，贯彻落实党中央和国务院决策部署，确保实现“平安高考”目标。考试招生制度改革和高考组织实施，都要始终牢记为党育人、为国选才，守好公平公正“生命线”。山西是第五批高考综合改革落地省份，要精心做好考务服务和综合保障工作，强化心理疏导和人文关怀，为莘莘学子营造良好考试环境。采取最严措施，加强试卷印制、运送、保管等全流程监管，严厉打击考试舞弊行为，严肃招生录取纪律，全力保证高考安全平稳顺利。 　　丁薛祥来到山西应用科技学院，调研民办高校发展情况。他表示，不管是公办大学还是民办大学，都是党办的大学。要把党的领导全面融入学校治理体系，强化思想政治引领，统一思政课要求和标准，把立德树人根本任务落到实处。适应产业升级新形势，在培养高技能人才的同时，注重培养经济社会发展需要的各类人

translation.summary: On 3 and 4 June, the Standing Committee of the Central Political Bureau of the Communist Party and Deputy Prime Minister of the State Council, Chen Xue Xian, worked in Shanxi to study the development of security and energy reform in Gao Cai. items.title: 中共中央办公厅印发《党组讨论和决定党员处分事项工作程序规定》
items.summary: 新华社北京6月5日电　近日，中共中央办公厅印发《党组讨论和决定党员处分事项工作程序规定》，并发出通知，要求各地区各部门认真遵照执行。 　　《党组讨论和决定党员处分事项工作程序规定》全文如下。 　　党组讨论和决定党员处分事项工作程序规定 　　（2018年11月29日中共中央批准　2018年11月29日中共中央办公厅发布　2025年5月26日中共中央修订　2025年5月26日中共中央办公厅发布） 　　第一条　为了规范党组讨论和决定党员处分事项，根据《中国共产党党组工作条例》、《中国共产党处分违纪党员批准权限和程序规定》，制定本规定。 　　第二条　坚持用改革精神和严的标准管党治党，落实党组（含党组性质党委，下同）全面从严治党主体责任，强化纪检监察机关派驻机构（以下简称派驻机构）监督职责，始终以严的基调、严的措施、严的氛围纵深推进正风肃纪反腐。 　　第三条　对党组管理的人员中的党员实施党纪处分，党组、纪委监委派出的纪检监察工委（以下简称派出机构）、派驻机构等应当按照规定权限和程序履行职责，加强协调沟通，有序顺畅衔接，形成工作合力，实现政治效果、纪法效果和社会效果有机统一。 　　第四条　党组讨论

translation.title: The Central Office of the Communist Republic of China issues the Regulations on the working procedures for the discussion and decision of party membership matters
translation.summary: In recent days, the Central Office of the Communist Party of China (CPC) issued a circular on working procedures for discussion and decision-making on party membership matters by Xinhua on 5 June in Beijing, and issued a circular requiring all regional departments to comply with it in good faith. The text of the Working Procedures Provisions for the Discussion and Decision of the Members of the Party Groups is reproduced below. items.title: 全国人大常委会启动节约能源法执法检查
items.summary: 新华社北京6月5日电 为推动节约能源法全面有效实施，促进更高水平、更高质量做好节能工作，全国人大常委会5日启动节约能源法执法检查。 节约能源法自1998年1月1日实施，并于2007年、2016年、2018年进行了修改。 记者5日从全国人大常委会节约能源法执法检查组第一次全体会议上了解到，为全面深入了解法律实施情况，此次执法检查采取实地检查与委托检查相结合的方式，检查组将赴天津、江苏、湖南、广东、广西、四川等省（区、市）开展实地检查，并委托北京、河北、山西、吉林、上海、重庆等省（市）人大常委会对本行政区域内节约能源法实施情况进行检查。检查组将采取实地检查、听取汇报、组织座谈、典型调研、专题研究、抽查暗访等多种方式，全面准确了解法律实施情况，对带有普遍性的问题深入调查研究。 检查组将重点检查8方面内容：落实节能管理制度情况，推进重点领域节能工作情况，重点用能单位节能管理情况，推动节能技术进步情况，实施节能激励措施情况，与法律配套的行政法规、部门规章以及地方性法规的制定情况，法律实施中存在的其他问题，对节约能源法修改的意见和建议。

translation.title: The Standing Committee of the National People ' s Congress initiated an energy-saving law enforcement inspection
translation.summary: In order to promote the full and effective implementation of the Energy Conservation Act and to promote higher and higher-quality energy efficiency, the Standing Committee of the National People ' s Congress launched an energy conservation law enforcement inspection on 5 June. The Energy Conservation Act has been in force since 1 January 1998 and was amended in 2007, 2016 and 2018. On 5 May, journalists learned from the first plenary meeting of the Standing Committee of the National People ' s Congress ' s Standing Committee on Energy Conservation Law Enforcement Inspection Unit that, in order to obtain a comprehensive and in-depth understanding of the implementation of the law, the inspection took the form of a combination of on-site inspections and commissioned inspections, which will be carried out in the provinces (districts and municipalities) of Tianjin, Jiangsu, Hunan, Guangdong, Guangxi, Sichuan and Beijing, Hebei, Shanxi, Jilin, Shanghai and Chongqing, among others. The Unit will have a comprehensive and accurate understanding of the implementation of the law and will conduct in-depth research and studies on issues of a general nature, in a variety of ways, including on-site inspections, debriefings, organization of talks, typical research, thematic studies, spot-checking and unannounced visits. The Unit will focus on eight areas: implementation of energy-saving management systems; promotion of energy-saving efforts in priority areas; focus on energy-saving management in energy-use units; promotion of technological progress in energy-saving; implementation of energy-saving incentives; development of administrative, sectoral and local regulations in conjunction with the law; other issues in the implementation of the law; and suggestions and recommendations for changes to the energy-saving law.
